etsy_title: ADHD Planner Printable Weekly Time Blocking PDF Dopamine Reward System Instant Download
etsy_description:
Finally, a weekly planner designed the way your ADHD brain actually works. This printable PDF planner combines time-blocking, visual scheduling, and a built-in dopamine reward tracker to help you stay focused, feel accomplished, and reduce overwhelm every single week.

What's inside:
• Weekly time-block schedule with flexible hourly slots
• Dopamine reward tracker to celebrate small wins
• Priority brain-dump worksheet to clear mental clutter
• Habit tracker with visual progress circles
• Daily focus card for single-task clarity
• End-of-week reflection sheet

Why it works for ADHD minds:
Short tasks, visual cues, and built-in rewards lower the barrier to starting. Time-blocking reduces decision fatigue. The reward system triggers motivation naturally without toxic hustle culture pressure.

Instant digital download — print at home on standard US Letter or A4 paper. No subscription, no app needed.

FAQ:
Q: Is this a physical product? A: No, this is a digital PDF download.
Q: Can I print multiple copies? A: Yes, for personal use.
Q: What size is it? A: US Letter (8.5x11), works on A4 too.
Q: Do I need special software? A: Just Adobe Reader or any PDF viewer.
